title: $:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music
author: uzvg
name: twks-music
description: A TiddlyWiki widget that allows you to easily embed external music players from Spotify & NetEase Cloud Music
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/demo":{"title":"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/demo","text":"<> <>"},"$:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/readme":{"title":"$:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/readme","text":"!! 1. Introduce: ''`twks-music`'' is a TiddlyWiki widget that allows you to easily embed external music players from: * Spotify * NetEase Cloud Music It provides a unified syntax to insert playable music cards into your TiddlyWiki, with support for: * Automatic theme adaptation (light/dark for Spotify) * Configurable width * Optional autoplay (NetEase only) !! 2. Syntax: ``` <" sid:"" autoplay:"<0|1>" width:"" theme:"">> ``` !! 3. Parameters: | !Parameter | !Required | !Default | !Description | |`provider` |✅ Yes |`"spotify"` |Music platform. Supported values: `spotify`, `netease` | |`sid` |✅ Yes |— |Track ID from the platform | |`auto` |❌ No |`"1"` |Autoplay setting (only effective for NetEase). `1` = autoplay, `0` = disabled | |`width` |❌ No |`"80%"` |Width of the embedded player (e.g. `300px`, `100%`) | |`theme` |❌ No |Auto |Theme for Spotify player: `light` or `dark`. If not set, follows TiddlyWiki system theme | !! 4. Usage Examples: !!! 🎧 Spotify Example ```tid # The spotify player will auto follow tiddlywiki's palette <> ``` With custom width and dark theme: ```tid <> <> ``` !!! 🎶 NetEase Music Example ```tid <> ``` Disable autoplay: ```tid <> ``` !! 5. Notes & Caveats: !!! Platform Differences ; ''Spotify'': * Supports theme switching (`light` / `dark`) * Does ''NOT'' support autoplay (restricted by browser policies) ; ''NetEase'': * Supports autoplay via `auto` parameter * No theme customization !!! Theme Behavior (Spotify) * If `theme` is not specified: ** The plugin automatically detects the current TiddlyWiki color scheme (`$:/palette`) ** Light mode → Spotify light theme ** Dark mode → Spotify dark theme !!! Invalid Input Handling * If `provider` is not `spotify` or `netease`, the widget will render: ``` ⚠️ Invalid Source ``` !!! ID Format * `sid` must be the ''track ID'', not the full URL ; Examples:
|tc-max-width|k | !Platform | !URL | !Correct `sid` | | !Spotify |`https://open.spotify.com/track/6norVbAE14clVMEyDuRw1m` |`6norVbAE14clVMEyDuRw1m` | | !NetEase |`https://music.163.com/#/song?id=448274120` |`448274120` |
"},"$:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/readme":{"title":"$:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/readme","text":"!! 1. 简介： ''`twks-music`'' 是一个 TiddlyWiki 微件，让你能够轻松嵌入以下外部音乐播放器： * Spotify * 网易云音乐 它提供了统一的语法，可在你的 TiddlyWiki 中插入可播放的音乐卡片，并支持： * 自动主题适配（Spotify 支持亮色/暗色主题） * 可配置的宽度 * 可选的自动播放（仅网易云音乐） !! 2. 语法： ``` <" sid:"" autoplay:"<0|1>" width:"" theme:"">> ``` !! 3. 参数： | !参数 | !必需 | !默认值 | !说明 | |`provider` |✅ 是 |`"spotify"` |音乐平台。支持值：`spotify`（Spotify）、`netease`（网易云音乐）| |`sid` |✅ 是 |— |平台对应的歌曲 ID | |`auto` |❌ 否 |`"1"` |自动播放设置（仅对网易云音乐有效）。`1` = 开启自动播放，`0` = 关闭 | |`width` |❌ 否 |`"80%"` |嵌入播放器的宽度（如 `300px`、`100%`）| |`theme` |❌ 否 |自动 |Spotify 播放器主题：`light`（亮色）或 `dark`（暗色）。未设置时跟随 TiddlyWiki 系统主题 | !! 4. 使用示例： !!! 🎧 Spotify 示例 ```tid # Spotify 播放器将自动跟随 TiddlyWiki 的配色方案 <> ``` 自定义宽度和暗色主题： ```tid <> <> ``` !!! 🎶 网易云音乐示例 ```tid <> ``` 关闭自动播放： ```tid <> ``` !! 5. 注意事项： !!! 平台差异 ; ''Spotify''： * 支持主题切换（`light` / `dark`） * ''不''支持自动播放（受浏览器策略限制） ; ''网易云音乐''： * 支持通过 `auto` 参数开启自动播放 * 不支持主题自定义 !!! 主题行为（Spotify） * 若未指定 `theme` 参数： ** 插件会自动检测当前 TiddlyWiki 的配色方案（`$:/palette`） ** 亮色模式 → Spotify 亮色主题 ** 暗色模式 → Spotify 暗色主题 !!! 无效输入处理 * 如果 `provider` 不是 `spotify` 或 `netease`，微件将渲染为： ``` ⚠️ Invalid Source ``` !!! ID 格式 * `sid` 必须是''歌曲 ID''，而非完整 URL ; 示例：
|tc-max-width|k | !平台 | !URL | !正确的 `sid` | | !Spotify |`https://open.spotify.com/track/6norVbAE14clVMEyDuRw1m ` |`6norVbAE14clVMEyDuRw1m` | | !网易云音乐 |`https://music.163.com/#/song?id=448274120 ` |`448274120` |
"},"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/readme","text":"\function lingo-base() [[$:/language]get[text]] +[match[$:/languages/zh-Hans]] ~[[$:/languages/en-GB]] +[addsuffix[/]] \end <>"},"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/tree":{"title":"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/tree","text":"<>"},"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/procedures/twks-music":{"title":"$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-music/procedures/twks-music","tags":"$:/tags/Global","code-body":"yes","text":"\procedure twks-music(provider:"spotify", sid, auto:"1", width:"80%", theme) \function get-spotify-theme() [match[light]then[1]] [match[dark]then[0]] [[$:/palette]get[text]get[color-scheme]match[light]then[1]else[0]] \end get-spotify-theme \procedure netease-src-template() https://music.163.com/outchain/player?type=2&id=$(sid)$&auto=$(auto)$&height=66 \procedure spotify-src-template() https://open.spotify.com/embed/track/$(sid)$?theme=$(theme)$ \function get-music-source() [match[spotify]thensubstitute[]] [match[netease]thensubstitute[]] \end get-music-source
<$let theme=<> src=<>> <% if [!is[blank]] %> <% if [match[spotify]] %> <% elseif [match[netease]] %> <% endif %> <% else %> @@text-align:center;font-weight:bold;color:red;⚠️ Invalid Source@@ <% endif %>
\end"}}}
